candidate_summary: Persian ney 4-register (bam/zir/geesh/pasgeesh) hierarchical nested null-spaces with register-transition null-gate, breath-velocity LR proportional to projection magnitude, partial-hole quarter-tone fractional projection, and interdental embouchure soft-threshold.

interdental teeth-grip tongue overblow neyzen turkoman
overblowing octave breath velocity embouchure harmonic transition
quarter-tone partial hole covering register null pressure
4-register hierarchical nested null-space N_bam subset N_zir subset N_geesh subset N_pasgeesh
register-transition null-gate G_trans + zero-update step during overblow
breath-velocity scheduler v_breath LR proportional to projection magnitude
partial-hole quarter-tone fractional projection 0.5 weighted-sum subspace interdental soft-threshold

results.name: GORP Continual Gradient Low-Rank Projection
results.rationale: Gradient low-rank projection for continual learning shares only the generic 'projection' concept; no register hierarchy, no null-gate, no breath/embouchure analog.

results.name: GNSP Gradient Null-Space Projection VLM
results.rationale: Null-space projection of gradients matches the 'null' projection idea but lacks the nested 4-register hierarchy, transition gate, velocity scheduler, and fractional partial-hole mixing.

results.name: Continual Gradient Low-Rank Projection LLMs ACL 2025
results.rationale: Low-rank projection variant; no nested null subspaces, no gating threshold τ_R, no breath-velocity LR analog.

results.name: SubTrack++ Gradient Subspace Tracking
results.rationale: Tracks gradient subspaces over time, but no hierarchical 4-level nesting, no transition null-gate, no fractional mixing weighted-sum.

results.name: PEGP Gradient Projection Parameter-Efficient Continual
results.rationale: Gradient projection for PEFT continual learning; lacks register-transition gate, breath-velocity scheduler, partial-hole fractional projection.

results.name: Common Null Space of Gradients ACM Multimedia
results.rationale: Common null space of gradients aligns with single-null concept but no nested 4-register chain N_bam⊂N_zir⊂N_geesh⊂N_pasgeesh, no overblow transition gate, no velocity LR.

results.name: Randomized Gradient Subspaces Efficient LLM Training
results.rationale: Randomized subspaces for efficient training; no hierarchical null structure, no transition gating, no fractional partial-hole projection.

results.name: Randomized Multi-Head LoRA (R-LoRA) EMNLP 2025
results.rationale: Multi-head LoRA randomization is unrelated to nested null-space register traversal, gating, or breath-velocity scheduling.

decision_rationale: No result reaches kw>=2, sem>=0.7, or func>=0.7. The candidate's distinctive combination of 4-level nested null-spaces, register-transition zero-update gate, breath-velocity LR, fractional partial-hole projection, and interdental soft-threshold is not matched by any retrieved work, which only cover generic gradient null-space / low-rank projection methods without hierarchical register structure or transition gating. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.72-0.92 / func 0.72-0.92 on gradient null-space + continual-projection adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E aggregate-adjacency vs per-paper scoring).
